message:
test: add production Playwright config and diagram probe E2E specs

- playwright-prod.config.ts: separate Playwright configuration for
  running E2E tests against the production deployment
- _probe-diagram.spec.ts: E2E probe test for diagram rendering
  verification on deployed site
- _tmp-diag-debug.spec.ts: temporary diagnostic debug spec for
  isolating diagram rendering issues in CI

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+import { defineConfig, devices } from "@playwright/test";
+
+const SKIP_WEBKIT = process.env.SKIP_WEBKIT === "true" || process.env.CI !== "true";
+
+export default defineConfig({
+  testDir: "./tests/e2e",
+  fullyParallel: true,
+  forbidOnly: !!process.env.CI,
+  retries: process.env.CI ? 2 : 0,
+  workers: process.env.CI ? 1 : undefined,
+  reporter: "html",
+  use: {
+    baseURL: "http://127.0.0.1:3000",
+    trace: "on-first-retry",
+    screenshot: "only-on-failure",
+  },
+  projects: [
+    {
+      name: "chromium",
+      use: { ...devices["Desktop Chrome"] },
+    },
+    {
+      name: "Mobile Chrome",
+      use: { ...devices["Pixel 5"] },
+    },
+    ...(!SKIP_WEBKIT
+      ? [{
+          name: "Mobile Safari",
+          use: { ...devices["iPhone 12"] },
+        }]
+      : []),
+  ],
+  webServer: {
+    // Build once and serve the production artifact to get realistic performance measurements.
+    command: "bun run build && bun run start --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port 3000",
+    url: "http://127.0.0.1:3000",
+    reuseExistingServer: true,
+    timeout: 180000,
+  },
+});
